title: AMD vs. Arm vs. Intel: The Best Stock to Play the Rise of Agentic AI
excerpt: Here's the one I would buy right now.
content_html:
With the rise of agentic AI, the number of central processing units (CPUs) used within AI data centers is set to explode. While graphics processing units (GPUs) are good at providing raw computing power, CPUs act more like the brains of the operation and can handle the sequential reasoning that lets AI agents stop and think before they act. As a result, the GPU-to-CPU ratio is expected to go from 8-to-1 for training, down to 4-to-1 for inference, and to 1-to-1 for AI agents.

With Nvidia predicting this could become a $200 billion market in the next few years, Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ: AMD), Arm Holdings (NASDAQ: ARM), and Intel (NASDAQ: INTC) are all set to benefit. Let's see which one of those three looks like the best agentic AI stock to buy.

Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing Again. In 2009, a "Double Down" signal flashed for a little-known chipmaker called Nvidia. For the first time in years, that same "Total Conviction" signal is flashing for a company 1/100th the size of Nvidia. Continue »

AMD is a leader in the data center CPU space, having consistently taken share away from Intel over the past few years. The company has strong technology and has developed high-core CPUs designed specifically for agentic AI. Cores act like individual workstations, and packing more cores into a CPU is like giving the chip a large workforce to help power autonomous AI agents. Its new Venice architecture, set to debut soon, utilizes up to 256 cores, making it ideal for agentic AI.

In addition to its agentic AI opportunity with its CPUs, AMD is also benefiting from the surging inference market with its GPUs. Its acquisition of memory optimization company MEXT, whose chiplet design allows it to be packaged with more memory, positions AMD well in the inference market, and it already has two massive deals in place with OpenAI and Meta Platforms. 

Intel

Intel has been one of the hottest stocks in the market over the past year, up around 323%. This largely stems from its data center CPU opportunity. While the company has arguably ceded its technological leadership in the space, data center CPU demand is so high that it has been a big boost to the company. And with supply generally tight, it has been able to increase CPU prices, which should help boost both its revenue and gross margin.

That said, Intel's larger computer chip business has been somewhat stagnant, and higher component prices (not just CPUs but also memory) could eventually hurt PC sales. Its foundry business also continues to struggle with losses. Intel was once a cheap stock based on the value of its physical assets, but that is no longer the case, given its huge surge over the past year.

sentences.zh: AMD 收购了内存优化公司 MEXT，该公司的小芯片设计使其能够封装更多内存，这使 AMD 在推理市场上占据了有利地位，并且已经与 OpenAI 和 Meta Platforms 达成了两项大规模交易。

While the company has arguably ceded its technological leadership in the space, data center CPU demand is so high that it has been a big boost to the company. And with supply generally tight, it has been able to increase CPU prices, which should help boost both its revenue and gross margin.

sentences.en: Intel has been one of the hottest stocks in the market over the past year, up around 323%.
sentences.zh: 英特尔是过去一年市场上最热门的股票之一，上涨了约323%。

sentences.en: This largely stems from its data center CPU opportunity.
sentences.zh: 这很大程度上源于其数据中心CPU机会。

sentences.en: While the company has arguably ceded its technological leadership in the space, data center CPU demand is so high that it has been a big boost to the company.
sentences.zh: 虽然该公司可以说已经放弃了在该领域的技术领先地位，但数据中心 CPU 的需求如此之高，这对该公司来说是一个巨大的推动。

sentences.en: And with supply generally tight, it has been able to increase CPU prices, which should help boost both its revenue and gross margin.
sentences.zh: 由于供应普遍紧张，它已经能够提高 CPU 价格，这应该有助于提高其收入和毛利率。

blocks.html_en: That said, Intel's larger computer chip business has been somewhat stagnant, and higher component prices (not just CPUs but also memory) could eventually hurt PC sales. Its foundry business also continues to struggle with losses. Intel was once a cheap stock based on the value of its physical assets, but that is no longer the case, given its huge surge over the past year.

sentences.en: That said, Intel's larger computer chip business has been somewhat stagnant, and higher component prices (not just CPUs but also memory) could eventually hurt PC sales.
sentences.zh: 也就是说，英特尔规模较大的计算机芯片业务有些停滞，而组件价格上涨（不仅是 CPU，还有内存）最终可能会损害 PC 销售。

sentences.en: Its foundry business also continues to struggle with losses.
sentences.zh: 其铸造业务也继续面临亏损。

sentences.en: Intel was once a cheap stock based on the value of its physical assets, but that is no longer the case, given its huge surge over the past year.
sentences.zh: 从其实物资产价值来看，英特尔曾经是一只廉价股票，但鉴于其在过去一年的大幅上涨，情况已不再如此。

content_html_zh:
随着代理人工智能的兴起，人工智能数据中心内使用的中央处理器 (CPU) 数量将呈爆炸式增长。 虽然图形处理单元 (GPU) 擅长提供原始计算能力，但 CPU 的作用更像是操作的大脑，可以处理顺序推理，让 AI 代理在行动之前停下来思考。 因此，训练时 GPU 与 CPU 的比例预计将从 8 比 1 下降到推理时的 4 比 1，以及 AI 代理的 1 比 1。

Nvidia 预测未来几年该市场可能会成为一个 2000 亿美元的市场，Advanced Micro Devices（纳斯达克股票代码：AMD）、Arm Holdings（纳斯达克股票代码：ARM）和英特尔（纳斯达克股票代码：INTC）都将受益。 让我们看看这三只股票中哪一只看起来最值得购买。

错过了 2009 年的 Nvidia？ 这个罕见的信号再次闪烁。 2009年，一家名不见经传的芯片制造商英伟达发出了“双倍下跌”的信号。 多年来，对于一家规模仅为 Nvidia 1/100 的公司来说，同样的“完全确信”信号闪烁。 继续 ”

AMD 是数据中心 CPU 领域的领导者，在过去几年中不断从英特尔手中夺走市场份额。 公司技术雄厚，开发了专为代理AI设计的高核CPU。 内核的作用就像单独的工作站，将更多内核装入 CPU 就好像为芯片提供大量劳动力来帮助为自主 AI 代理提供动力。 即将推出的全新 Venice 架构采用多达 256 个核心，非常适合代理 AI。

除了 CPU 带来的代理人工智能机遇之外，AMD 的 GPU 还受益于蓬勃发展的推理市场。 AMD 收购了内存优化公司 MEXT，该公司的小芯片设计使其能够封装更多内存，这使 AMD 在推理市场上占据了有利地位，并且已经与 OpenAI 和 Meta Platforms 达成了两项大规模交易。

Intel

英特尔是过去一年市场上最热门的股票之一，上涨了约323%。 这很大程度上源于其数据中心CPU机会。 虽然该公司可以说已经放弃了在该领域的技术领先地位，但数据中心 CPU 的需求如此之高，这对该公司来说是一个巨大的推动。 由于供应普遍紧张，它已经能够提高 CPU 价格，这应该有助于提高其收入和毛利率。

也就是说，英特尔规模较大的计算机芯片业务有些停滞，而组件价格上涨（不仅是 CPU，还有内存）最终可能会损害 PC 销售。 其铸造业务也继续面临亏损。 从其实物资产价值来看，英特尔曾经是一只廉价股票，但鉴于其在过去一年的大幅上涨，情况已不再如此。
